name: Suez Canal / Red Sea route exposure
region: Egypt / Red Sea / Mediterranean-Indian Ocean corridor
typical_planning_impact: If disrupted or avoided, Asia-Europe traffic may be rerouted around the Cape of Good Hope, adding major transit time and fuel/cost exposure.
readiness_action: If route depends on Suez/Red Sea, check current Suez Canal Authority circulars, carrier route advisories, and security notices before confirming readiness.
hard_gate_condition: Only hard gate if live authority/carrier/security advisory confirms closure, prohibition, or carrier refusal for the intended sailing.

name: Panama Canal draft and transit exposure
typical_planning_impact: Draft and daily transit-slot changes can force booking delays, lighter loading, alternate routing, or higher transit cost exposure.
readiness_action: If route depends on Panama Canal, check current Panama Canal Authority advisories for maximum authorized draft, booking slots, and transit restrictions.
hard_gate_condition: Hard gate only if current advisory shows the vessel/cargo plan cannot transit under current draft/slot rules.

name: Strait of Malacca exposure
typical_planning_impact: High-density Asia trade corridor; disruption or congestion can affect schedule reliability.
readiness_action: Flag as strategic chokepoint exposure for Asia-Europe/Asia-Middle East routings; validate carrier ETA and schedule buffer.
hard_gate_condition: Hard gate only if live authority/carrier/security advisory confirms closure or sailing restriction.

name: Bab-el-Mandeb / Red Sea exposure
typical_planning_impact: Security incidents can cause carrier avoidance of Red Sea/Suez route and rerouting via Cape of Good Hope.
readiness_action: For routes using Red Sea/Suez, validate current carrier routing and security advisories before confirming timeline.
hard_gate_condition: Hard gate only when carrier refuses the route or live security/authority notices block transit.

name: Strait of Hormuz exposure
typical_planning_impact: Strategic energy and Gulf trade chokepoint; disruption can affect insurance, carrier acceptance, and service reliability.
readiness_action: For Gulf cargo, validate carrier acceptance, insurance/security advisories, and schedule buffer.
hard_gate_condition: Hard gate only when carrier, authority, or security advisory blocks intended transit.
